title: iria capillaris
intro: Iria capillaris, also known as the Yellow-flowering Iria or Yellow Iria, is a plant species that belongs to the family Fabaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting digestion. Iria capillaris can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions for its medicinal use, or used in combination with other herbs in traditional medicine.
